project_type: TypeScript monorepo - Fastify 5 backends, Next.js 15 frontends, pnpm workspaces
build_system: pnpm 10 + Turborepo 2. Root scripts: turbo typecheck/build/test/lint. Each package has its own package.json scripts.
test_framework: Vitest 2 for unit tests (each package has vitest run). Playwright for e2e (root playwright.config.ts, tests in e2e/tests/). k6 for load tests.
verification_instructions: 1. pnpm turbo typecheck - ALL pass. 2. pnpm turbo build - ALL pass. 3. pnpm turbo test - ALL pass. 4. pnpm turbo lint - ALL pass.
setup_instructions: pnpm install (lockfile exists). Node 22 required. pnpm-workspace.yaml includes apps/*, packages/*, services/*.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Can install any npm packages. Docker available.
contribution_requirements: All packages use type:module ESM. tsconfig extends root. Each package needs package.json, tsconfig.json. Workspace deps use workspace:*.
key_patterns: Packages export from src/index.ts. Fastify plugins use fastify-plugin wrapper. Server-core provides createApp factory. Tests use vitest. E2E tests use Playwright page objects pattern with fixtures in e2e/fixtures/. k6 scripts are ES6 modules with options export and default function. Docker compose uses quant-network bridge.
directory_structure: apps/ - 17 apps (admin, quantmail, quantchat, quantai, etc). packages/ - 80+ shared packages (server-core, search, observability, auth, etc). services/ - backend services (ws-gateway). e2e/ - Playwright tests with fixtures. k6/ - existing load test scripts (3 files). docker/ - Docker configs. .github/workflows/ - CI.
